holdings.infoBox: HDV is an equity ETF with a total of 80 individual holdings. The top holdings are Exxon Mobil stock at 7.72%, Chevron at 6.02%, Johnson & Johnson at 5.85%, AbbVie at 5.72%, and Philip Morris International at 4.61%.

overview.description: The iShares Core High Dividend ETF (HDV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Morningstar Dividend Yield Focus index. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of 75 high-yielding US equities, screened for high earnings potential and dividend sustainability. HDV was launched on Mar 29, 2011 and is issued by BlackRock.
